title: [MTR4] Class 777
description: A Version of the Class 777 on the Merseyrail Network, Now in Minecraft!
body:
**_COMPATABLE ONLY WITH MINECRAFT TRANSIT RAILWAY BETA 12 OR LATER!_**

The Class 777 _METRO_ is an Electric Multiple Unit used on the Merseyrail Network In Liverpool, England, UK. It is the Replacement for the Class 507 and 508, and is Manufactured by Stadler. This Version is based on the Class 762 from the PäRail Trains Addon 1.4.0.

The Trains are 4 Coach Sets. The /1 Variant has the ability to run on Battery Power for the expantion to Headbolt Lane.

The [Class 507 and 508 Pack by LX9702](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/british-rail-classes-507-and-508) Is Recomended aswell for The older Merseyrail Stock.
